item.title: Trans Girl Tuesday
item.description:
I gotta say that I feel that transitioning is one of the most beautiful things in the world. To discover yourself and do so much work and sacrifice so much to be the person you were meant to be, it's so inspiring.
Wiggly are Juicy are dating and they are adorable.
HRT is magic, but like, for real.
She's heavily involved in the Zelda fandom, founder and creator of multiple fansites, and I think she streams too?
She's such a sweetheart, always trying to uplift others, and call out BS, including that within the trans community (lots of these posts were responses to a trans woman saying 20 was too late too start transitioning)
It's never too late, don't ever give up. Persist out of spite if you have to. I don't really know what else to say. For now this is all I can really do. I hope these posts inspire at least one person to keep pushing forward.
item.dc:creator: MermaidNinja

item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Monday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
mmm hmm
sort of
that's unsettling
true, dudes liked to travel apparently
almost as if these places were named long ago
finally
an acceptable answer
i want to be that frog
same
usersub newest is the best
i guess
as is tradition
wait what
such a great movie
not sure i believe that
obviously
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!

item.title: For all of you beautiful people out there
item.description: I don't know how to put this in any other way. This is for my LGBTQ+ people in the US. If you have the means to come to the UK but you need an initial place to stay to get settled, my home is open for you! I understand you might be scared and hesitant. After all I am just some rando. I understand you might find this post dramatic and over the top, then please skip. I want to do what I can to make someone feel safe. I am totally okay if this dies in usersub ;)

item.dc:creator: autonomousbias

item.title: “All civilization has from time to time become a thin crust over a volcano of revolution”
item.description: Hello, I recently posted to get feedback regarding this sticker design. And for that I thank you. Previous post: https://imgur.com/gallery/1LNpZtc I will be running the first batch of stickers to check quality. If they look good I will be running rolls of a thousand. If you would like some stickers please message me. I will be giving these away for free. Some folks have requested patches and shirts. I would have to charge for those and that would take a lot of work. But, if you wanted to make your own patches or tee shirts I can send you the graphic files for you to use as you see fit. *Edit* I also have a full black and white version as well. And also feel free to share and use! Thank you.
item.dc:creator: HanWayneSolo

item.title: I cannot over state this, folks, do not obey in advance!
item.description: Over the next few years we will hear a constant stream of bull shit. It will be stated as though it is law. It isn’t! Think back to your school house rock! Turning a bill into a law is a long and complex process. Some one (no matter who) making an absurd statement is even harder to legislate. Do not give him powers he does not have. Statements are not legally enforceable!

item.dc:creator: Packbonds

item.title: Facebook, I fucking hate you
item.description: Because of the amount of time it takes to report reels on Facebook, the algorithm thinks I like watching animal abuse videos. So that's all I've been getting tonight from it. So I decided: fuck it, Poison it further. Get to the bottom of the fucking barrel. But every reel I reported? Automatically rejected with no option to have it re-evaluated. So I went scorched earth. A dozen "kennels" clearly involved in dog fighting in the US have now been thoroughly documented by me, and I'll be reporting them all to the dog fighting hotline. I don't give a fuck about any possible reward. After today, I wanna watch them all BURN. Spent the last hour curing my algorithm by searching terms like 'cute', 'art', 'tattoos', etc. so tomorrow I can at least see better things and leave this horrible fucking day behind me. Comment something that made you laugh, we can all use it

item.title: Got a case of the Tuesdays
item.dc:creator: FlaskandStein

item.title: POV: You made you own wedding dress
item.description:
Guys! I did a thing! I made my own wedding dress!!! :’)
Making my own dress was something I always dreamed of doing, as someone who loves sewing, but my besties (who were definitely looking out for me) didn’t want me to be stressing over this project in case it went awry. So after purchasing a backup dress (anyone want one, because I’d like to sell it lol) I consulted with my girls and they agreed it’d be reasonable for me to try putting together a dress of my dreams as long as I could be confident enough in it in time to get the backup dress altered if it came down to it. So, in 6 weeks, starting in March, I had this sweet girl in one piece and wearable. There was no going back at that point!
I was able to fit it exactly as I wanted it by piecing together patterns and creating the neckline and backline from scratch. I utilized my late grandma’s necklace on the back to give it a special touch.
And created the removable tulle overskirt with only two people knowing about that detail prior to wedding day.
Every button and stitch were sewn with love and a fair amount of swearing. It fit exactly as I envisioned at the start of this process and I couldn’t have been happier with the end result!!
It was so bittersweet zipping it up in a garment bag after the wedding, after it had occupied my sewing space for 8 months. But can’t wait to show it off to my babies someday with pride!
Big shoutout to my husband for being patient with me as I constantly locked him out of our office space that doubles as my sewing space
The big reveal to my crew!
Photo cred to our amazing photographers - gleasonphoto on Insta - based out of Nebraska <3 Edit: lol damn y’all up in arms about the title I threw in there…my apologies, it’s my POV, looking at my wedding photos and being proud of something I made, MY BAD?!
item.dc:creator: beccalikesstuff

item.dc:creator: seeyatellite

item.title: Comics from my favorites and a plee for help
item.description:
source: http://www.svetlania.com/index.shtml Hey, Imgur. My name's Athena. This post ends with a plee and a go fund me, but I'll mostly leave the comics unbroken, this message aside. I've written more as you go down the post, but for now? Enjoy the Princess of Pluto.
Fun fact! This frame was where Imgur used to place the "load more images" part of posts. Suspenseful!
I am a trans woman living in the US. I am horrified about what is coming. I have been working on a plan to get out of the US for awhile, but a part of that plan depended on finishing this year at my job.
source: https://secondlina.tumblr.com/post/76073595885/here-is-knot-a-short-comic-i-drew-to-sell-at
I am a teacher. Which means I work with children (though they would prefer I call them Young Adults) every day. High schoolers.
source: https://satwcomic.com/ Project 2025 directly claims that "transgenderism" is pornographic
source: https://captaingalaga.tumblr.com What's it called when someone purposely shows pornographic content to children? Especially if it's not a video, but they themselves? Side note: I love the comments from when I favorited this that those are Captain America and Iron Man showing up to support Peter Parker. Good chance that's the creator's intent.
source: https://screamingiggle.tumblr.com/ So many abandoned tumblrs... Yes, I am comparing "existing while trans" with someone flashing kids. Not because I think they are at all similar, but because I think they will be *construed* as similar in the not so distant future in the US.
source: Rugrats the show (and Rugrats: All Grown Up)
It feels like that, sometimes.
source: https://www.miyuliart.com/comics/ tapas: https://tapas.io/episode/31562
My plan was to save up the funds to be able to afford a student visa to study in Germany and work towards my Master's degree. I have applied for other funding sources, like Fullbright and DAAD, but self funding is the safest. But I can't achieve that if I am not able to finish the entire school year at my job. Even if I can finish the entire year, it will still be closer than I am comfortable with.
source (I think): https://www.instagram.com/tohdraws/ Kinda hard to check for sure without an instagram account! And that's before worrying about if I can even safely stay in the US long enough to finish the school year... I know I'm being a bit paranoid, I know that if stuff gets bad it'll probably get bad slowly but I'm afraid Side note: there are definitely some spicier comics about those two! And some cool stuff I saw scrolling Insta before it locked me out from seeing more.
So yeah. That's my story, I guess. If you are willing and able, any help is appreciated. I set up a GoFundMe awhile ago for it. Currently at $1,000 of the $15,000 goal, though I set that when I assumed I would be able to work the rest of the school year and would just need some supplement and help with the travel and early days. https://gofund.me/f5447b22 I should really make an "oh gods Republicans won" update to it... Thanks for reading, and I hope you liked the results of digging through my old favorites for comics and such. It was a fun task for me, too. If you are curious, the amount of money required to get a student visa in Germany for the 2 years a master degree is around 25,000 Euros. So yeah. Thank you. Have a good day, a good year, and hopefully I am massively overreacting and paranoid.
I ALMOST FORGOT THE PET TAX (I do not have any cats, stupid allergies) Say hello to Anubis! I love this dog so much <3
The hardest part of leaving is going to be leaving him. With my parents! I would NEVER consider giving him up. If I overshoot the funding by enough, I could even bring him with. That would be great. But if I can't, I know I will be able to see him again. My parents are doing good, if the US doesn't fall too far they will be fine, and if it does fall that far, well, hopefully their retirement savings won't crash and they can retire to another country. Enjoy my Anubis being VERY mad we woke him up. He is staring absolute daggers. And thank you. Tschüss!
item.dc:creator: AthenaF

item.title: Enjoy these (or don't)
item.description:
An "I can smell this picture" moment. Also, I loved the TEXTURE of these things! ...Here is a bunch of stuff for you to look at; some new, some old, and some are (what I consider to be) absolute classics that make me laugh EVERY. SINGLE. TIME. :)
Let's all just go ahead AND BE WEIRD WITH EACH OTHER LIKE THIS, please
That little happy smile (◠◡◠) Very cute birb, 10/10.
Ancient Roman marketing geniuses
At the final stage of the knock-knock joke, you find out that you are NOT glad it's not banana
ᵗᵉᵉⁿⁱᵉˢᵗ ᵍᵃʳⁿⁱˢʰ
Crayola either needs to sort it out themselves, or hire people like right-side-box person, to sort it out for them
At least there's this. Bluebatch Crayolabox approved
Nature is so beautiful! A frightened or startled photocopier may release ink in order to aid its escape.
Points for dedication, style, AND ALSO for mac and cheese.
the tags THE TAAAAAAAGS
( ♥‿♥) Delightful
I read the text in the Pac Man sound, for sure :)
I feel confident that some Imgurians will take it a step further and dickbutt that sky up real good
Call the police, the man is UNHINGED
Is this true? I don't know, I'm not Irish. ( ͡° ͜ʖ ͡°)
...Is THIS true? I don't CARE! Hand me a potato for every meal ❤
Educational moment! If you live in an area where these beautiful guys ARE indigenous, and you want to keep them around, you may have to do your yardwork a bit differently :) It means things like not raking your leaves/keeping dedicated leaf piles **the larvae need to live in fallen leaves for around two years!**, not using lawn chemicals, and so on. Here are some other firefly environment needs to consider: https://hgic.clemson.edu/leave-the-leaves-for-the-fireflies/
Pyrite is so NEAT.
**pun applause**
I can only deduce that humans are berries.
I have known many cats who DO love belleh rubs, so actually I think this IS a cat, after all
...See the obvious cat similarities??! Surely, Canadian lynx are the floofiest fluffiest things in our country. And their feet are (among) the absolute best feet in our country, too.
This might actually be a cat
I just think this is a sweet, cool thing/reason
I might laugh until my head fell off
(ಠ_ಠ)
But what else will they use the walkie talkies for, then!?
This year I will celebrate my Bobᵗʰ birthday
"I could play it better" - Penguin, probably
They were doing so well, otherwise, though!
Let us suffer together ❤❤❤
he *screm
SCREM.
......SCREM.
I picture the boyfriend just rolling his eyes and shaking his head affectionately; if not slightly exasperated, every time. (◠◡◠)
Just the one brother, pre- and post-shave. Nothing to see here.
Handle the truth, you must
NOTE: I haven't fact-checked this.
Goats are the GOATs
Titty soap launching as a new Olympic sport?
*Stone faced, maybe, even
The stork's new delivery system is super fast, but it doesn't handle potholes very well.
Hon hon hon!
JE SUIS... PAIN
Hill Hill Hill Hill?
...Hill Hill Hill Hill.
Google these guys lioconcha hieroglyphica really look like this. COOL (but we probably shouldn't try deciphering and reading out loud those runes. You know, just in case.)
Be adult. Pay bills. HAVE FUN.
NOTE: I haven't fact-checked this, either.
"MEATY SHLAP", people!
Black cats are great. HAVE A VERY NICE DAY.
